Wearables, Home and Accessories

Wearables includes smartwatches, wireless headphones and spatial computers. The Company's line of smartwatches, based on its watchOSÂŽ operating system, includes Apple Watch UltraÂŽ 2, Apple WatchÂŽ Series 10 and Apple Watch SEÂŽ. The Company's line of wireless headphones includes AirPodsÂŽ, AirPods ProÂŽ, AirPods MaxÂŽ and BeatsÂŽ products. Apple Vision Proâ˘ is the Company's first spatial computer based on its visionOSâ˘ operating system.

Home includes Apple TVÂŽ, the Company's media streaming and gaming device based on its tvOSÂŽ operating system, and HomePodÂŽ and HomePod miniÂŽ, high-fidelity wireless smart speakers. Accessories includes Apple-branded and third-party accessories.
